newProject.title: Create a new project
newProject.description: Start from scratch or clone a configuration template.
newProject.noTemplates: No templates available yet. Save an existing project as a template from its settings.

saveAs.title: Save project as template
saveAs.description: Captures the current project's settings, custom fields, saved views, dashboards, automations, workflow definitions, task statuses, and role placeholders. Business data (tasks, wiki pages, comments, runs) is not copied.
saveAs.descriptionPlaceholder: Optional notes about when to use this template.

page.title: Project templates
page.description: Reusable project configuration snapshots you've saved or installed.

empty.user: You haven't saved any projects as templates yet.
empty.system: No system templates are available in this environment.

page.editDescription: Rename or update the description. The underlying snapshot is not changed.
page.deleteDescription: This removes the template from your library. Projects already created from it are not affected.
